decisions.rationale: Valid ui-fidelity note: the isCompleted branch renders an invented CheckCircle2 + Completed label with no Bubble ui_ref, while bTJGk workflow removes completed sessions from focused_m_commitment_custom_pathsession so the branch is unreachable after markMicroCommitmentCompleted refresh. However all named DASH-03 ui_refs (bTJFv, bTJGB, bTJGH, bTJGS, bTJGY, bTJGe) pass ui_evidence and criteria_audit AC-2 is pass; no downstream item lists DASH-03 in depends_on. Removing the dead branch is strict Bubble RG parity polish, not a blocker — defer as optional cleanup within DASH-03 or a later dashboard polish pass.

Valid schema-dependency gap: end-to-end visibility requires PATHS enrollment to populate path_enrollment1 (pathenrollment1 table or profiles.onboarding_data fallback). DASH-03 scope and AC-3 require read-via-Supabase with Bubble binding parity; coverage preflight documents the prototype-schema gap and microCommitmentsApi implements best-effort pathenrollment1 query plus onboarding_data fallback. Provisioning pathenrollment1 and enrollment write paths are explicitly owned by PATHS-03-path-detail-enrollment-popup (AC-3 create/update pathenrollment1) and PATHS-06-enrollment-floating-services-bar (pathenrollment1 search/RG). DASH-03 does not block those depends_on gates; defer migration and QA seed documentation to PATHS wave.

Valid ux note: returning null during loading briefly suppresses the greeting-row slot before data resolves. DASH-03 ACs and layout_notes specify collapse when focused session list is empty (Bubble collapse_when_hidden on bTJFv/bTJGA), not a loading skeleton or shell placeholder. criteria_audit and functional_audit FV-5 pass; this is nice-to-have loading-state polish with no named ui_ref gap and no downstream depends_on impact. Defer skeleton or load-then-collapse behavior to a later polish pass.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 remove invented completed-badge branch for strict Bubble RG parity (optional DASH-03 cleanup); C-2 pathenrollment1 migration and enrollment write path to PATHS-03 and PATHS-06; C-3 loading-state shell/skeleton polish.
